0.original: and do other work that requires top mental performance. 2 00:00:04,240 --> 00:00:09,490 Rather than wait for the spirit to move you, sit down and move your spirit. 3 00:00:10,559 --> 00:00:13,890 Here's a special technique guaranteed to help you. 4 00:00:14,080 --> 00:00:16,049 Use a pencil and paper. 5 00:00:16,400 --> 00:00:20,930 A simple pencil is the greatest concentration tool money can buy. 6 00:00:21,120 --> 00:00:29,410 If I had to choose between an ultra-fancy, deeply carpeted, beautifully decorated soundproof office and a pencil and paper, 7 00:00:29,680 --> 00:00:32,290 I'd choose the pencil and paper every time. 8 00:00:32,480 --> 00:00:36,770 With a pencil and paper, you can tie your mind to a problem. 9 00:00:37,440 --> 00:00:43,410 When you write a thought on paper, your full attention is automatically focused on that thought. 10 00:00:43,760 --> 00:00:49,650 That's because the mind is not designed to think one thought and write another at the same time. 11 00:00:50,000 --> 00:00:54,210 When you write on paper, you write on your mind, too. 12 00:00:54,640 --> 00:01:02,770 Tests prove conclusively that you remember something much longer and much more exactly if you write the thought on paper. 13 00:01:03,280 --> 00:01:11,490 And once you master the pencil and paper technique for concentration, you can think in noisy or other distracting situations. 14 00:01:11,760 --> 00:01:16,290 When you want to think, start writing or doodling or diagramming.
0.b1: and do other work that needs your full brain power. Instead of waiting for motivation to come, start working and create your own motivation. Here is a special method that will definitely help you. Use a pencil and paper. A simple pencil is the best tool for focus that you can buy. If I had to choose between a very expensive, quiet office and a pencil and paper, I would always choose the pencil and paper. With a pencil and paper, you can keep your mind on a problem. When you write a thought down, you focus all your attention on it. This is because your brain cannot think about one thing and write another at the same time. When you write on paper, you are also recording it in your mind. Tests show that you remember things much longer and more clearly if you write them down. Once you learn how to use a pencil and paper to focus, you can think even in noisy or busy places. When you want to think, start writing, drawing, or making diagrams.
0.cn: 并完成其他需要高度脑力活动的工作。不要等待灵感降临，坐下来，主动去激发你的灵感。这里有一个保证对你有帮助的特殊技巧。使用纸和笔。一支简单的铅笔是你花钱能买到的最好的专注工具。如果我必须在装修豪华、隔音良好的办公室和纸笔之间做选择，我每次都会选择纸笔。有了纸和笔，你可以让你的思维紧扣一个问题。当你把想法写在纸上时，你的全部注意力会自动集中在那个想法上。这是因为大脑无法同时思考一件事并写下另一件事。当你写在纸上时，你也在大脑中留下了印记。测试明确证明，如果你把想法写在纸上，你会记得更久、更准确。一旦你掌握了纸笔专注法，你就能在嘈杂或其他干扰环境下进行思考。当你想要思考时，开始写字、涂鸦或画图表吧。
0.ai_notes:
'top mental performance': the highest level of brain activity or focus.
'the spirit to move you': an idiom meaning waiting for inspiration or the desire to do something to happen naturally.
'guaranteed': promised to have a certain result.
'ultra-fancy': extremely luxurious or high-quality.
'soundproof': designed to prevent sound from entering or leaving a room.
'tie your mind to a problem': a metaphorical way of saying you are keeping your focus strictly on one specific task.
'conclusively': in a way that provides final proof and leaves no doubt.
'doodling': drawing small, informal pictures or patterns while thinking or waiting.
0.remarks:
'top mental performance': 大脑活动或专注力的最高水平。
'the spirit to move you': 指等待灵感或做某事的欲望自然而然地出现。
'guaranteed': 保证会有某种结果。
'ultra-fancy': 极其奢华或高质量的。
'soundproof': 设计用来防止声音进入或传出的。
'tie your mind to a problem': 比喻将注意力严格集中在某一个特定任务上。
'conclusively': 以一种提供最终证据且毫无疑问的方式。
'doodling': 在思考或等待时随手画的小图或图案。
